name: QoyodInvoiceIntakeCase
description: Track 1 Maestro Case for batch phone-captured invoice intake, external LLM extraction, finance review, Chrome extension Qoyod draft creation, and exception resolution.

data.label: Start Invoice Batch Intake
data.description: Manual or API start after the phone PWA uploads the batch source invoices and QR metadata.

data.label: Capture Intake
data.description: Register the source file, QR TLV payload, bucket path, and local job ID created by the capture API.

tasks.description: API workflow that records the batch capture payload with the intake backend and completes Capture Intake.

data.label: Extraction And Reconciliation
data.description: Start external or local LLM extraction through the backend extraction API, then reconcile QR and extracted totals.

tasks.description: API workflow that starts batch extraction, polls backend progress, records validation output, and routes errors to exception handling.

data.label: Finance Review And Mapping
data.description: Human task for finance to correct extracted fields, choose supplier/item/expense mappings, and approve only draft creation.

tasks.description: Action Center checkpoint for finance to review the extracted batch in the web app, correct data, choose mappings, and approve draft creation.

data.taskTitle: Review extracted invoice and approve Qoyod draft creation
data.name: =bindings.bH4qVt9Lp

data.label: Destination Posting
data.description: Verify finance review state and wait for selected destination posting, including ERPNext draft creation before Qoyod handoff.

tasks.description: API workflow that polls the backend for reviewed invoices, ERPNext draft creation, and the next destination stage.

data.label: Qoyod Drafting
data.description: Chrome extension handoff to fill the Qoyod draft form in the logged-in user browser and save a draft only.

tasks.displayName: Wait For Qoyod Extension Draft Save
tasks.description: API workflow that waits for the Qoyod Chrome extension to claim, fill, and save the reviewed draft, or report a fill exception.

data.label: Exception Resolution
data.description: Human resolution lane for invalid QR, total mismatch, missing mapping, duplicate invoice, login, selector, or attachment failures.

tasks.description: Placeholder Action Center task for exception decisions, reject, rework, or manual resolution.

data.label: Closed
data.description: Complete the Case after Qoyod draft saved, finance rejection, or manually resolved exception.

tasks.description: API workflow that records final closed status, references, and closure details back to the intake backend.
